ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the property */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the property */,
  "avg_area_income" REAL /* Average income of the area */,
  "avg_area_house_age" REAL /* Average age of houses in the area */,
  "avg_area_number_of_rooms" REAL /* Average number of rooms in houses in the area */,
  "avg_area_number_of_bedrooms" REAL /* Average number of bedrooms in houses in the area */,
  "area_population" REAL /* Population of the area */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., single-family home, apartment, condo) */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "square_footage" REAL /* Total square footage of the property */,
  "number_of_bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "garage_type" TEXT /* Type of garage (e.g., attached, detached, none) */,
  "lot_size" REAL /* Size of the lot in square feet */,
  "property_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the property (e.g., excellent, good, fair) */,
  "last_sold_date" TEXT /* Date the property was last sold */,
  "last_sold_price" REAL /* Price at which the property was last sold */,
  "zillow_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier from Zillow or other real estate platforms */,
  "google_maps_link" TEXT /* Link to Google Maps for the property location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the location */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the area */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population in the area */,
  "median_house_age" REAL /* Median age of houses in the area */,
  "school_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the local school system */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate in the area */,
  "proximity_to_public_transport" TEXT /* Proximity to public transport (e.g., bus, subway) */,
  "proximity_to_commercial_areas" TEXT /* Proximity to commercial areas (e.g., shopping centers, restaurants) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_locations" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the property was added to the location */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the property data (e.g., MLS, Zillow, real estate agent) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id", "location_id")
)
